subject: FW: Palm Beach
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 

-----Original Message-----

To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Palm Beach

Dear Jeffrey,

If you're going to be in Florida, Margaret and I would like to have you
over for dinner.

Sent from my iPhone
